summary: Kang Hyunwoo recruits new allies while navigating the complex main scenario quest involving tattooed monsters, all while maintaining his mysterious online persona. He engages in a friendly but competitive monster-hunting race with his guild members and continues to deal with internet trolls by blacklisting a hostile fan named Jung Hanbaek. Finally, he focuses on his personal growth, training his skills and meeting with his mentor, Dwayne, to demonstrate his progress as a swordsman.
key_moments: Hyunwoo recruits for the main scenario and discusses the guild's participation with Kwon Youngchan.
A major quest to exterminate 222 tattooed monsters is issued, leading to a friendly competition between Hyunwoo and his team.
Hyunwoo blacklists a toxic fan named Jung Hanbaek on his video channel and meets with his mentor, Dwayne, to showcase his training.
